name: Redibase Cream of Broccoli Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onions in butter until soft.
2. Add flour and stir until smooth.
3. Pour in water and Chicken Redi-Base; add chopped broccoli, bay leaf, salt, and pepper.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat.
5. Reduce heat to low and let it cook for about 15 minutes or until the broccoli is fully thawed.
6. Stir in light cream, adjusting seasoning with more salt and pepper if needed.
7. Serve. This soup can also be made with asparagus or spinach instead of broccoli, and you may try substituting Turkey or Vegetable Redi-Base for Chicken for a different flavor profile. Serves 6.
